displayMode.description: Defines the Product Summary Image display mode.

mainImageLabel.description: Matches catalog image labels to determine the primary display image.

hoverImageLabel.description: Selects the hover image via label matching. Deprecated — use hoverImage instead.

hoverImage.description: Defines the criteria that should determine the hover image based on the product images.

aspectRatio.description: Sets the image aspect ratio using standard notation (e.g., 1:1, 3:4).

maxHeight.description: Establishes maximum height when width/height are configured (responsive object).

fetchpriority.description: Sets the fetch priority hint for the product image resource.

^product-summary-image(#.*)?$.description: Renders the product image in the product summary component, supporting badges, hover images, and responsive sizing.

showFieldsProps.default: { showProductReference: false, showBrandName: false, showSku: false }
showFieldsProps.description: Defines the visibility of certain properties (showProductReference, showBrandName, showSku).

tag.description: HTML tag used to render the product name.

^product-summary-name(#.*)?$.description: Renders the product name inside a Product Summary component.

labelSellingPrice.description: Text of the selling price's label

labelListPrice.description: Text of the list price's label

showListPriceRange.description: Set if you want to see list price as range (lowest - highest)

showSellingPriceRange.description: Set if you want to see selling price as range (lowest - highest)

^product-summary-price(#.*)?$.description: Renders the price information of a product in the product summary context, including list price, selling price, installments, and discount value.

warningQuantityThreshold.description: Displays the quantity of remaining items in stock if the available quantity is less than or equal to the value given to this property.

showUnit.description: Whether the unit of measurement should be displayed (true) or not (false).

size.description: Preset size values for font-size and padding.

showLabel.description: Whether a label should be displayed (true) or not (false).

selectorType.description: Defines how the quantity selector should initially behave: stepper (input field with adjustment buttons) or dropdown (predefined-quantity list).

quantitySelectorStep.description: Defines how the number of products that have unitMultiplier will work: singleUnit (quantity unaffected) or unitMultiplier (quantity affected by multiplier).

^product-summary-quantity(#.*)?$.description: Displays a quantity selector for a product inside the product summary shelf. Must be declared as a child of product-summary.shelf.

^product-summary-sku-name(#.*)?$.description: Renders the name of the currently selected SKU in the Product Summary context. The block only displays the SKU name when it differs from the product name. No storefront-configurable props are documented — customization is done via the CSS handle `skuNameContainer`.

classes.description: Overrides default CSS handles for React components.

disableUnavailableSelectOptions.description: Disables impossible product combinations when displayMode is set to select.

displayMode.description: Controls how variation names/thumbnails are displayed.

hideImpossibleCombinations.description: Hides impossible variations instead of showing them with reduced opacity.

imageHeight.description: Height in pixels for the product thumbnail image (also accepts responsive object).

imageWidth.description: Width in pixels for the product thumbnail image (also accepts responsive object).

initialSelection.description: Controls which variation is pre-selected when the page loads.

maxItems.description: Maximum number of variation items shown before a 'See more' button appears.

showValueForVariation.description: Determines which variation value (image or label) is displayed when selected.

sliderArrowSize.description: Size in pixels of the navigation arrows when displayMode is slider.

sliderDisplayThreshold.description: Minimum number of variation items required to trigger slider display mode.

sliderItemsPerPage.description: Number of slider items shown per page, broken down by device type (desktop, tablet, phone).

showVariationsErrorMessage.description: Shows an error message when the user tries to add to cart without selecting a variation.

showVariationsLabels.description: Controls where and how variation names are displayed relative to the selector.

thumbnailImage.description: Defines the first image to display by its imageLabel when the variation is image-based.

variationsSpacing.description: Bottom margin applied between variation groups, using Tachyons spacing scale (0–11).

visibility.description: Defines when the SKU selector should be displayed.

visibleVariations.description: Restricts the selector to only show the specified variation names.

^product-summary-sku-selector(#.*)?$.description: Renders a SKU Selector inside the Product Summary block, allowing users to select product variations (color, size, etc.). Uses the same props as the vtex.store-components SKU Selector.

^product-summary-space(#.*)?$.description: A flex-grow spacer block with no configurable props. It renders an empty div that expands to fill available space in a flex container, used to push sibling blocks apart within product summary layouts.

specificationGroupName.description: Name of the specification group in which the desired specifications are.

specificationName.description: Name of the specification to target; if empty, targets all specifications in the group.

visibleWhen.description: Displays the badge only when the specification has this exact matching value.

displayValue.description: Value displayed on the badge when the specification condition is met; accepts SPECIFICATION_NAME, SPECIFICATION_VALUE, or a custom string.

specificationsOptions.description: Array of Option objects to individually control display conditions for specific specifications.

orientation.description: Determines whether the group of specification badges is displayed vertically or horizontally.

blockClass.description: Custom name appended to the component CSS classes for targeted styling.

^product-summary-specification-badges(#..description: Renders badges based on product specifications inside a product summary layout.

priceBehavior.description: Determina se o componente deve buscar o preço mais atualizado (`async`) ou usar o preço padrão (`default`).

trackListName.description: Determina se o componente deve enviar o nome da lista para a página do produto quando o product summary é clicado.

sponsoredBadgeLabel.description: Texto exibido na tag 'Sponsored' de produtos patrocinados, quando aplicável.

sponsoredBadgePosition.description: Define a posição da tag 'Sponsored' de produtos patrocinados, quando aplicável.

^product-summary\\.shelf(#.*)?$.description: Bloco principal do Product Summary app, contendo os blocos filhos necessários para exibir resumos de produtos nas lojas.

priceBehavior.description: Controls whether the client requests the price simulation API for all sellers (async), only for the 1P seller (asyncOnly1P), or skips the API call (default).

trackListName.description: Whether the listName should be sent to product pages via querystring for analytics tracking.

sponsoredBadgePosition.description: Predefined position of the sponsored badge displayed on the product card, if applicable.

sponsoredBadgeLabel.description: Label text for the sponsored badge displayed on the product card.

placement.description: Indicates where this ProductSummary is being shown, used for analytics (e.g. 'search' or 'shelf').

classes.description: Custom CSS handles object to override default CSS handle classes (container, containerNormal, element, clearLink).

extraProductProps.description: Extra data attributes spread onto the section element; all keys must start with 'data-' (e.g. data-af-category).

^product-summary\\.unstable--flex(#.*)?$.description: Flex layout variant of Product Summary that renders product information (image, name, price, etc.) in a flex container. Maps to the ProductSummaryCustom component and accepts children blocks for composable layouts.

^product-variations(#.*)?$.description: Renders the product variations (SKU specifications) for items in the product list. This block has no configurable props — it reads data from ItemContext via useItemContext() hook.

render.description: Function prop called with an array of objects containing label and value to display custom profile fields alongside default user information.

^profile-display(#.*)?$.description: Extension point rendered on the Profile page (above the edit button) that allows stores to display custom customer data. The component receives a render prop and calls it with an array of {label, value} objects to display additional profile fields without breaking the page layout

^profile-display-container(#.*)?$.description: Extension point block rendered inside the Profile page (above the Edit button), allowing apps to display custom customer data fields alongside default profile info. The implementing component receives a `render` prop (injected by VTEX IO ExtensionPoint) and must call it with an a

registerValidator.description: Function provided by the parent component to register a custom validator; the validator should return a boolean or Promise<boolean> indicating whether the form can proceed.

registerSubmitter.description: Function provided by the parent component to register a custom submitter; the submitter is called after all validations pass to persist custom field data.

^profile-input(#.*)?$.description: Extension point that renders custom content inside the profile editing form, right above the 'toggle business fields' button. Receives registerValidator and registerSubmitter callbacks to integrate with the form's validation and submission lifecycle.

registerValidator.description: Function provided by the parent form that child components must call in componentDidMount to register their validation function. The validator should return true (valid) or false (invalid), or a Promise resolving to a boolean.

registerSubmitter.description: Function provided by the parent form that child components must call in componentDidMount to register their submission function. Called after all validators pass, receiving the profile data as argument.

^profile-input-container(#.*)?$.description: Extension point that renders inside the profile editing form, allowing child blocks (profile-input) to inject custom fields. Passes registerValidator and registerSubmitter to child components so they can hook into the form's validation and submission lifecycle.

^promo-bar(#.*)?$.description: Layout slot/container block defined in vtex.store with component: "*". Acts as a named region in the store header layout with no configurable props of its own; content is provided by child blocks such as notification.bar.

mode.description: Tipo de input do seletor de quantidade. 'default' exibe dropdown (muda para input após 10 itens); 'stepper' sempre exibe um stepper numérico.

quantitySelectorStep.description: Define como a quantidade de produtos com unitMultiplier se comporta: 'singleUnit' ignora o multiplicador; 'unitMultiplier' ajusta a quantidade de acordo com o unitMultiplier.

^quantity-selector(#.*)?$.description: Bloco para seleção de quantidade de produto na lista de produtos (ex: minicart). Suporta modo dropdown/stepper e controle do multiplicador de unidade.

variation.description: Variation for the button's visual prominence based on the VTEX Styleguide.

displayMode.description: Defines how the remove button should be displayed (icon or text).

^remove-button(#.*)?$.description: Button used to remove items from the product list (minicart/cart).

^responsive-layout(#.*)?$.description: Container block that renders its children only when the current screen size matches the declared breakpoint variant (desktop, tablet, phone, mobile). Has no configurable props — behavior is entirely determined by which variant suffix is used in store/blocks.json.

^responsive-layout\\.desktop(#.*)?$.description: Renders its children blocks only when the current device is desktop. Uses composition: children — no configurable props.

^responsive-layout\\.mobile(#.*)?$.description: Renders its children blocks only when the current device is detected as mobile. No configurable props — the block uses composition:children to receive child blocks.

^responsive-layout\\.phone(#.*)?$.description: Renders its children blocks only when the current device is identified as a phone. No configurable props — the block works exclusively via block composition (children). Source confirmed at https://github.com/vtex-apps/responsive-layout and https://developers.vtex.com/docs/apps/vt

^responsive-layout\\.tablet(#.*)?$.description: Renders its children blocks only when the current device screen size matches the tablet breakpoint. Uses composition: children — no configurable props beyond child block declarations.

blockClass.description: Unique class name appended to block classes for CSS customization.

font.description: Tachyon token used as font for the text.

htmlId.description: HTML id attribute of the element.

textColor.description: Tachyon token used as text color.

text.description: Text content written in Markdown to be rendered.

textPosition.description: Text position relative to the component.

^rich-text(#.*)?$.description: Renders markdown text content with configurable typography, color, alignment, and positioning options.

area.description: Indicates the area. It must match the area configured in the banner.

blockClass.description: Assigns a custom CSS class to the banner container element.

horizontalAlignment.description: Defines the horizontal alignment for the banner.

^search-banner(#.*)?$.description: Displays a banner configured in the VTEX search/merchandising settings, matched by area name.

attemptPageTypeSearch.description: If true, clicking on a brand, department or category result link navigates to the corresponding page type.

autocompleteAlignment.description: Horizontal alignment of the autocomplete dropdown.

autocompleteFullWidth.description: If true, the autocomplete fills the entire window width.

autoFocus.description: Defines whether the search input should be auto-focused.

blurOnSubmit.description: If true, the input loses focus when the search is submitted.

classes.description: Custom CSS classes for overriding CSS handles.

compactMode.description: If true, renders the search bar in compact mode.

containerMode.description: Defines whether the autocomplete displays as an overlay or inline container.

customSearchPageUrl.description: Custom URL template for the search page, using ${term} as a placeholder for the search term.

disableBlurAndTouchEndHandler.description: If true, disables the blur and touchEnd event handlers on the input.

displayMode.description: Controls which action buttons are displayed alongside the search input.

emptyPlaceholder.description: Text displayed in the autocomplete when there are no results.

hasIconLeft.description: If true, the search icon is placed on the left side of the input.

iconClasses.description: Custom CSS classes applied to the search icon.

inputType.description: HTML type attribute for the search input element.

maxWidth.description: Maximum width of the search bar (accepts number or CSS string value).

minSearchTermLength.description: Minimum number of characters required before the autocomplete is triggered.

openAutocompleteOnFocus.description: If true, the autocomplete opens as soon as the input receives focus.

placeholder.description: Placeholder text displayed inside the search input.

submitOnIconClick.description: (Deprecated) If true, clicking the search icon submits the search.

^search-bar(#.*)?$.description: Search bar block for VTEX IO storefronts, providing autocomplete, customizable display modes, and configurable input behavior.

^search-content(#.*)?$.description: Decides, behind the scenes, which block to display: either the `gallery` block (if products are found) or the `not-found` block (if selected filters lead to an empty search results page). Both `gallery` and `not-found` must be declared as its children. This block has no configura

htmlElementForButton.description: Specifies which HTML element displays for the Show more button component. Use 'a' for an anchor element with href and rel attributes, or 'button' for a standard button element.

^search-fetch-more(#.*)?$.description: Renders a 'Show more' button that loads the next search results page. Does not render if there is no next page.

htmlElementForButton.description: Specifies which HTML element displays for the Show previous button component. Use `a` to render an anchor element with href and rel attributes, or `button` to render a button element.

^search-fetch-previous(#.*)?$.description: Bloco que exibe um botão para carregar a página anterior de resultados de busca. Não renderiza quando o usuário está na primeira página.

^search-layout-switcher(#.*)?$.description: Enables mobile users to switch between the available layout modes. This block receives no props and uses gallery-layout-option blocks as children.

hiddenFacets.description: Indicates which filters should be hidden on the search results page.

showFacetQuantity.description: Determines whether the resulting amount in each filter should appear beside its name.

showFacetTitle.description: Determines whether the facet title should appear on the selected filters section.

blockClass.description: Unique identifier used as a handle for CSS customization.

trackingId.description: ID used by Google Analytics to track search result page metrics.

mobileLayout.description: Controls how the search results page is displayed on mobile layout.

defaultGalleryLayout.description: Determines the default gallery layout name when multiple gallery layouts are available.

thresholdForFacetSearch.description: Minimum number of facets that must be displayed for the search bar to appear in the filter panel.

preventRouteChange.description: Keeps page customizations even when the user applies new filters, preventing route changes.

showShippingMethodFacet.description: Determines whether Shipping Method filters should be displayed.

^search-not-found-layout(#.*)?$.description: Layout block displayed when a search returns no results. Shares the same props as search-result-layout.desktop and search-result-layout.mobile.

^search-products-count-per-page(#.*)?$.description: Displays the product count per search results page. When declared, this block does not require any props.

^search-products-progress-bar(#.*)?$.description: Shows a progress bar of search results. When declared, this block does not need any props.

^search-result(#.*)?$.description: Legacy structural container block for the search results page. Requires a gallery child block and allows filter-navigator, total-products, order-by, breadcrumb, not-found, search-title, rich-text, and search-products-progress-bar as children. Configurable props are exposed via th

hiddenFacets.description: Indicates which filters should be hidden on the search results page.

showFacetQuantity.description: Determines whether the resulting amount in each filter should appear beside its name on the filter-navigator.v3 block.

showFacetTitle.description: Determines whether the facet title should appear on the selected filters section on the filter-navigator.v3 block.

blockClass.description: Unique block ID used for CSS customization.

trackingId.description: ID used by Google Analytics to track store metrics based on the Search Result block.

mobileLayout.description: Controls how the search results page is displayed to users on mobile layout.

defaultGalleryLayout.description: Determines the default name of the gallery layout on the search results page. Required when the gallery block explicitly defines several layouts.

thresholdForFacetSearch.description: Specifies the minimum number of facets that must be displayed for the search bar to appear. Declaring 0 always shows the search bar.

preventRouteChange.description: Keeps page customizations even when the user applies new filters, changing only the URL query string rather than the entire URL.

showShippingMethodFacet.description: Determines whether Shipping filters should be displayed or not.

^search-result-layout(#.*)?$.description: Layout block for search result pages. Its child variants (search-result-layout.desktop, search-result-layout.mobile, search-not-found-layout) share these props.

querySchema.description: Defines the custom search query to be executed. Contains fields like queryField, mapField, maxItemsPerPage, orderByField, etc.

queryField.description: Query string of the search URL that defines the results to fetch in the custom query (inside querySchema). Requires mapField to be set.

mapField.description: Search URL's map parameter to define which results to fetch in the custom query (inside querySchema). Requires queryField to be set.

maxItemsPerPage.description: Maximum number of items per search page. Maximum allowed value is 50.

orderByField.description: Determines the order products follow when displayed.

hideUnavailableItems.description: Determines whether the search result should hide unavailable items (true) or not (false).

facetsBehavior.description: Defines the filters' behavior. Dynamic restricts results by selected filters; Static keeps all filters visible.

skusFilter.description: Refines the SKUs returned for each product in the query.

simulationBehavior.description: Defines whether the search data will be up-to-date (default) or fetched using the cache (skip).

installmentCriteria.description: Defines which price to display when different installments are available.

excludedPaymentSystems.description: List of payment systems not to consider when displaying installment options to users.

includedPaymentSystems.description: List of payment systems to consider when displaying installment options to users.

^search-result-layout\\.customQuery(#.*).description: Block used to display search results in templates that don't fetch Search context (e.g., Home). Accepts a querySchema prop to define and execute custom search queries.

hiddenFacets.description: Indicates which filters should be hidden on the search results page.

showFacetQuantity.description: Determines whether the resulting amount in each filter should appear beside its name.

showFacetTitle.description: Determines whether the facet title should appear on the selected filters section.

blockClass.description: Unique block identifier used for CSS customization.

trackingId.description: ID to be used in Google Analytics to track store metrics from the search results.

mobileLayout.description: Controls how the search results page is displayed to users using a mobile layout.

defaultGalleryLayout.description: Determines the default gallery layout name displayed on the search results page.

thresholdForFacetSearch.description: Minimum number of facets that must be displayed before a search bar appears in the filter navigator.

preventRouteChange.description: Keeps page customizations even when the user applies new filters, preventing route changes.

showShippingMethodFacet.description: Determines whether shipping method filters should be displayed on the search results page.

^search-result-layout\\.desktop(#.*)?$.description: Layout block for displaying search results on desktop. Controls facets, gallery layout, tracking, and routing behavior.

hiddenFacets.description: Indicates which filters should be hidden on the search result page.

showFacetQuantity.description: Whether filter result amounts are displayed beside filter names.

showFacetTitle.description: Whether the facet title appears in the selected filters section.

blockClass.description: Unique block ID used as a handle for CSS customization.

trackingId.description: ID used for Google Analytics tracking of the search result block.

mobileLayout.description: Controls how the search results page displays on mobile layout, with mode1 and mode2 options (normal, small, inline).

defaultGalleryLayout.description: Name of the default gallery layout to be used; must match the name prop of the desired layout.

thresholdForFacetSearch.description: Minimum number of facets required for a search bar to be displayed in the filter navigator.

preventRouteChange.description: Keeps page customizations when filters are applied, preventing route changes.

showShippingMethodFacet.description: Whether shipping method filters are displayed on the search result page.

^search-result-layout\\.mobile(#.*)?$.description: Layout block for rendering search result pages on mobile devices. Shares the same props as search-result-layout.desktop and search-not-found-layout.

customPage.description: Defines a custom page to the link of a suggestion. Example: store.search.custom.

^search-suggestions(#.*)?$.description: Displays search term suggestions related to the current query, with optional custom page routing for suggestion links.

^search-title(#.*)?$.description: Displays a title for the performed search on the search results page. The block (mapped to SearchTitle component) has no user-configurable props documented in the official VTEX IO documentation; breadcrumb and wrapperClass are internal/injected props, not store/blocks.json-level

^search-title\\.v2(#.*)?$.description: Displays a title for the performed search. The component derives the title from the current search context (breadcrumb + query map) and renders it as an h1 element. No user-configurable props are exposed in the official documentation or block schema.

isOneClickBuy.description: Defines if users will keep navigating in the same page once the Buy button was clicked on (true) or if they will be redirected (false)

^seller-add-to-cart(#.*)?$.description: Displays a Buy button that adds a given seller's product to the shopping cart. Accepts child blocks buy-button or add-to-cart-button.

^seller-body(#.*)?$.description: Defines the page main content. Responsible for displaying all sellers' data in the table body. Accepts seller-row as children. No configurable props documented.

^seller-head(#.*)?$.description: Builds a header to be used on the Seller Selector table. Accepts seller-head-cell blocks as children. No first-level props are documented for this block.

title.description: Text displayed on the table header for each column.

^seller-head-cell(#.*)?$.description: Cell component for the seller table header, used to define column header titles.

^seller-name(#.*)?$.description: Displays the seller name. This block has no configurable props — it reads the seller name directly from the CurrentSellerContext.

^seller-price(#.*)?$.description: Displays the seller price for a given product. This block has no configurable props — it retrieves price data via internal context (useCurrentSeller hook) and accepts no configuration.

^seller-price-with-shipping(#.*)?$.description: Displays the purchase final cost (shipping cost + product price). No configurable props are documented in the official VTEX IO documentation.

^seller-row(#.*)?$.description: Used inside the Seller Selector table to separate seller's data into columns. Accepts seller-name, seller-price, seller-shipping, seller-price-with-shipping, and seller-add-to-cart as children. No configurable props documented.

^seller-shipping(#.*)?$.description: Displays shipping cost considering the sellers' data. This block has no configurable props — it consumes data exclusively via React Context (useCurrentSeller and useSellerContext hooks).

^seller-simulate-shipping(#.*)?$.description: Builds a form so users can add a postal code and then simulate the shipping costs to the desired address.

limitShownShippingInformation.description: Max number of shipping options to be displayed.

^seller-table(#.*)?$.description: Layout block that provides a table to build the Seller Selector page with other blocks such as seller-simulate-shipping, seller-head, and seller-body.

buttonsContainerClass.description: CSS classes for the button container.

className.description: CSS classes for the main container.

imageUrl.description: Image URL to share on social media.

options.description: Share button options, such as size.

shareLabelClass.description: CSS classes for the share label.

social.default: {Facebook: true, Twitter: true, WhatsApp: true, Pinterest: true}
social.description: Social media icons to be displayed (Facebook, Twitter, WhatsApp, Pinterest).

^share(#.*)?$.description: Renders social media share buttons for a product or page, supporting Facebook, Twitter, WhatsApp, and Pinterest.

category.description: The category ID used to fetch products for the shelf.

collection.description: The collection ID used to fetch products for the shelf.

orderBy.description: Defines the sorting order of the products displayed in the shelf.

hideUnavailableItems.description: Whether out of stock items should be hidden (true) or not (false).

paginationDotsVisibility.description: Controls the visibility of pagination dots in the shelf slider.

productList.description: Product list schema configuration object for the shelf layout and behavior.

trackingId.description: Name to show in Google Analytics; defaults to the block name if not provided.

maxItems.description: Maximum number of items to be displayed in the shelf.

^shelf(#.*)?$.description: Displays a shelf of products from a given category or collection, with configurable sorting, pagination, and product list layout.

recommendation.description: Type of recommendations that will be displayed on the shelf.

groupBy.description: Defines whether recommendations are grouped by product or show all SKUs.

hideOutOfStockItems.description: Whether out of stock items should be hidden (true) or displayed (false).

productList.description: Schema containing display settings for the shelf (maxItems, scroll, arrows, showTitle, titleText, gap, itemsPerPage, etc.).

^shelf\\.relatedProducts(#.*)?$.description: Displays a shelf with related products based on a recommendation type (similars, suggestions, accessories, etc.).

isEnabled.description: Controls whether the tabbed shelf component is visible/enabled.

headline.description: Main heading text displayed above the tabbed shelf.

bottomText.description: Footer text displayed below the tabbed shelf.

tabs.description: Array of tab configuration objects (max 6), each with an id (category ID) and __editorItemTitle (tab label).

shelf.description: Shelf component configuration object, inheriting props from the shelf block schema.

buttonText.description: Label text for the call-to-action button displayed on the shelf.

buttunUrl.description: Navigation URL for the call-to-action button (note: original code contains this typo).

^shelf\\.tabbed(#.*)?$.description: Renders a tabbed shelf of products, allowing multiple product lists organized into navigable tabs (up to 6 tabs).

required.description: When true, the shipping method modal cannot be dismissed until a method is selected after a postal code is entered.

mode.description: Controls the display mode of the shipping method selector trigger.

^shipping-method-selector(#.*)?$.description: Displays a selector for the shopper to choose between delivery or pickup shipping methods, complementing the location setter in the storefront header.

callToAction.description: Defines the type of overlay that opens when the page loads.

compactMode.description: When enabled, hides the button label and displays only the current location value.

dismissible.description: Controls whether the modal can be dismissed without entering a postal code.

shippingSelection.description: Defines which shipping option selector is displayed (both delivery and pickup, or only pickup).

showLocationDetectorButton.description: When enabled, displays a geolocation button that automatically detects the user's current location and sets the postal code.

^shipping-option-location-selector(#.*)?.description: Renders a set of components that allow users to add their location and/or select a store for pickup, typically declared as a child of the store header block.

pricingMode.description: Defines how shipping information is displayed when a product includes gifts or attachments: grouped by type or per individual item.

shouldUpdateOrderForm.description: Determines whether interacting with the shipping simulator should update the shopper's address in their orderForm.

skuId.description: ID of the current product SKU.

^shipping-simulator(#.*)?$.description: Simulates shipping costs for a given SKU and seller, allowing shoppers to enter their postal code and see available delivery options.

^shop-review-badge(#.*)?$.description: Abstract interface block (Noop component) that serves as a public extensibility point for shop-level review badge widgets. It has no configurable props of its own; concrete props are defined by the implementing app (e.g., vtex.trustpilot's trustpilot-widget).

^shop-review-form(#.*)?$.description: Abstract interface block for shop review forms. Defined as a Noop component with extensible: public — it is a placeholder with no configurable props; implementing apps (e.g. vtex.reviews-and-ratings) override this interface and may expose their own props.

^shop-review-summary(#.*)?$.description: Abstract interface block (Noop component, extensible: public) that acts as a slot for merchant review summary implementations. It has no configurable props of its own — third-party apps implement this interface to render store-level review summaries.

required.description: When true, opens a non-dismissible postal code modal until a valid code is set; when false, uses the popover flow.

mode.description: Display mode of the location setter control.

showLocationDetectorButton.description: Shows a button that uses the browser geolocation API to suggest the postal code automatically.

^shopper-location-setter(#.*)?$.description: Block that renders a location input control (postal code setter) in the store header, enabling the Delivery Promise feature by capturing the shopper's location.

size.description: Size of the close button icon.

type.description: Visual style type of the close button icon.

^sidebar-close-button(#.*)?$.description: Botão de fechar exibido no canto superior direito da sidebar de filtros mobile, permitindo ao usuário dispensar o painel de filtros.

classes.description: Overrides default CSS handles for React component styling.

disableUnavailableSelectOptions.description: Disables impossible product combinations when displayMode is 'select'.

displayMode.description: Defines how variations are displayed: as buttons (default), a select dropdown, or a slider.

hideImpossibleCombinations.description: Whether to hide or show unavailable variation combinations.

sortVariationsByLabel.description: Alphabetically sorts variation options by label.

imageHeight.description: Thumbnail image height in pixels. Supports device breakpoints via object.

imageWidth.description: Thumbnail image width in pixels. Supports device breakpoints via object.

initialSelection.description: Defines which SKU variations are pre-selected on page load.

maxItems.description: Maximum number of variation items shown before a 'See more' button appears.

showValueForVariation.description: Controls whether the selected variation value is displayed next to the label.

sliderArrowSize.description: Size in pixels of the navigation arrows when displayMode is 'slider'.

sliderDisplayThreshold.description: Minimum number of variations required before slider mode is activated.

sliderItemsPerPage.description: Number of slides visible per page per device breakpoint (desktop, tablet, phone).

showVariationsErrorMessage.description: Shows an error message when the user tries to add to cart without selecting a variation.

showVariationsLabels.description: Controls what label text is displayed alongside each variation option.

thumbnailImage.description: Image label used to match and display the first corresponding thumbnail image.

variationsSpacing.description: Bottom margin between variation groups, using Tachyons spacing scale (0–11).

visibility.description: Whether to show variation selectors always or only when more than one option exists.

visibleVariations.description: Specifies which variation names to display, filtering out all others.

^sku-selector(#.*)?$.description: Displays SKU variation selectors (color, size, etc.) on product pages, allowing shoppers to choose a specific SKU.

label.description: aria-label attribute value to be used by the Slider component when rendered.

showNavigationArrows.description: Indicates when navigation arrows should be rendered.

showPaginationDots.description: Indicates when pagination dots should be rendered.

infinite.description: Determines whether the slider should loop infinitely.

usePagination.description: Determines whether the slider should use slide pages or continuous scrolling.

itemsPerPage.description: Quantidade de itens por pagina por tipo de dispositivo.

navigationStep.description: Number of items to scroll when users click navigation arrows; can be set as 'page' to scroll a full page.

slideTransition.description: Animacao de transicao (CSS) entre os slides.

delay.description: Atraso antes da transicao, em milissegundos.

timing.description: Funcao de easing CSS (ex.: ease, linear).

stopOnHover.description: Pausa o autoplay quando o mouse esta sobre o slider.

fullWidth.description: Determines whether slides should occupy the full page width.

arrowSize.description: Slider arrow icon dimensions in pixels; can also be a responsive object per device type.

centerMode.description: Defines the positioning of slider elements; can also be a responsive object per device type.

centerModeSlidesGap.description: Number of pixels between slides when centerMode is active.

^slider-layout(#.*)?$.description: Slider layout block for VTEX IO storefronts, allowing content to be displayed in a carousel/slider format with configurable navigation, pagination, autoplay, and responsive behavior.

^slider-layout-group(#.*)?$.description: Logical block that synchronizes slides rendered by each slider-layout block declared within it. It does not expose any props of its own — it only accepts a children list of slider-layout blocks, all of which must share identical props and values.

title.description: Text to show above the list of social network links.

socialNetworks.description: Array of social network objects, each containing a URL and a network name.

showInColor.description: Whether the social network icons are displayed in color or monochrome.

^social-networks(#.*)?$.description: Displays a list of social network icons/links with an optional title, supporting colored or monochrome icons.

blockClass.description: Allows passing a custom name to be added to component CSS classes.

zIndexOffset.description: An offset for the zIndex of the children. The first child gets this value, subsequent children receive incrementally higher values.

arialabel.description: A value to customize the aria-label property of the stack layout element.

^stack-layout(#.*)?$.description: The stack-layout block allows you to stack blocks on top of each other, controlling their z-index layering order.

blockClass.description: Unique class name appended to the container class for custom CSS targeting.

position.description: Indicates where the component should stick on the screen (top or bottom).

verticalSpacing.description: Distance in pixels from the position chosen in the position prop.

^sticky-layout(#.*)?$.description: Bloco que mantém seu conteúdo fixo (sticky) na tela enquanto o usuário rola a página, podendo ser fixado no topo ou na parte inferior.

position.description: Indicates where the component should stick. Overrides the position of its children sticky-layout blocks.

^sticky-layout\\.stack-container(#.*)?$.description: Container block that stacks multiple sticky-layout blocks, controlling where they stick on the screen.

^store\\.account(#.*)?$.description: Page template block for the account area (/account route). Acts as a container that requires the my-account block and wraps content with the challenge.profile block. Has no configurable props of its own.

^store\\.blog-category(#.*)?$.description: Page template block for the blog category route (/blog/category/:categoryslug_id). It is a route container with no configurable props of its own; content is composed via child blocks.

^store\\.blog-home(#.*)?$.description: Blog homepage route template provided by the vtex.wordpress-integration app. Acts as a page container that can be extended (e.g. store.blog-home#custom) to create additional custom blog pages; it has no directly configurable first-level props.

^store\\.blog-post(#.*)?$.description: Page route template for individual blog post pages (path: /blog/post/:slug_id). It is a container block with no configurable props of its own — content is rendered by child blocks such as blog-post-container.wordpress and blog-post-details.wordpress-post-details.

^store\\.blog-search-result(#.*)?$.description: Page-level template block for blog search results pages. Defined in vtex.store interfaces.json as a container that renders header.full before the page and requires blog-search-list as a child block. It has no configurable props of its own — configuration is done by composing chil

^store\\.custom(#.*)?$.description: Page template block used to define custom routes in a Store Theme app. It acts as a container with no first-level configurable props of its own; layout and content are composed entirely via child blocks declared in store/blocks.json and routed through store/routes.json.

^store\\.home(#.*)?$.description: Page-level home template block in vtex.store. Acts as a container that wraps the homepage with homeWrapper; all content customization is done via child blocks declared inside it. No user-facing configurable props.

optionsTitle.description: Text to entitle the login options.

emailAndPasswordTitle.description: Text to display the email-and-password option.

accessCodeTitle.description: Text to display the access-code option.

emailPlaceholder.description: Text to be displayed as placeholder to the email input.

passwordPlaceholder.description: Text to be displayed as placeholder to the password input.

acessCodePlaceholder.description: Text to be displayed as placeholder to the access code input.

showPasswordVerificationIntoTooltip.description: Whether a tooltip responsible for checking the password format should be shown.

showIconProfile.description: Whether the profile icon should be displayed on the Login component.

iconLabel.description: Text string to entitle the Login icon.

hideIconLabel.description: Whether the text string defined for the Login icon should be hidden.

providerPasswordButtonLabel.description: Text to be displayed as the password button label.

identifierPlaceholder.description: Text to be displayed as placeholder to the extension input.

invalidIdentifierError.description: Error message for invalid user identifier.

mirrorTooltipToRight.description: Whether the Login tooltip should open towards the right side.

logInButtonBehavior.description: Expected behavior of the Login component when clicked on.

accountOptionsButtonBehavior.description: Expected behavior of the My Account button when clicked on.

accountOptionLinks.description: Creates custom links to replace the default account page link.

termsAndConditions.description: Text to be displayed below the login options regarding terms and conditions.

hasGoogleOneTap.description: Whether Google's One-tap sign-up and auto sign-in solution should be enabled.

googleOneTapAlignment.description: Defines pop-up alignment for the Google One-tap login.

googleOneTapMarginTop.description: Defines the pop-up top margin for the Google One-tap login.

disabledEmailInputs.description: Whether user email editing should be allowed.

blockOAuthAutoRedirect.description: If true, login will not auto-redirect when only one OAuth provider is active.

^store\\.login(#.*)?$.description: Login block that renders the login button and handles authentication flows in the VTEX IO storefront.

^store\\.not-found(#.*)?$.description: Page template block rendered when the server returns a 404 error; acts as a container for child blocks and has no configurable props of its own.

^store\\.orderplaced(#.*)?$.description: Page template block for the Order Placed page. Acts as a top-level container that renders the order-placed child block; has no configurable props of its own.

^store\\.product-review-form(#.*)?$.description: Interface placeholder block (Noop) defined in vtex.product-review-interfaces. It has no configurable props of its own — it acts as an extensibility contract that third-party review apps implement.

^store\\.wishlist(#.*)?$.description: Interface block for the /wishlist route that renders the wishlist custom page. The official documentation does not define any first-level props for this block; it acts as a route container composed of child blocks (list-context.wishlist, flex-layout, etc.).

submenuWidth.description: Controls the width of the submenu container. Accepts '100%' (full width) or 'auto'.

^submenu(#.*)?$.description: Container block for submenus in VTEX Menu. Accepts a single configurable prop for controlling submenu display width.

^submenu-col(#.*)?$.description: Layout column container used inside a submenu block to group menu items into columns. It has no configurable props — it accepts only children via block composition.

isOpen.description: Controls whether the accordion submenu is expanded (true) or collapsed (false).

blockClass.description: Custom CSS class handle suffix used to override default CSS handles for this block instance.

^submenu\\.accordion(#.*)?$.description: Accordion-style submenu container that collapses/expands its children based on the isOpen state. Used inside menu-item blocks on mobile/responsive layouts.

^summary-coupon(#.*)?$.description: Renders a coupon input field in the checkout summary. This block has no configurable props.

markers.description: IDs of your choosing to identify the block's rendered message and customize it using the admin's Site Editor.

blockClass.description: Block ID of your choosing to be used in CSS customization.

message.description: Defines the block's default text (the block message). Supports template variables: installmentsNumber, installmentValue, installmentsTotalValue, interestRate, paymentSystemName, hasInterest.

^summary-installments(#.*)?$.description: Renders the product installments in the checkout summary. If more than one installment option is available, the one with the biggest number of installments is displayed.

showTotal.description: Whether to display the complete order total.

showDeliveryTotal.description: Whether to display the shipping/delivery charges total.

showOriginalTotal.description: Whether to show the original list price alongside the items subtotal.

^summary-totalizers(#.*)?$.description: Renders individual order cost breakdowns showing totalizers such as items subtotal, delivery charges, and order total.

blockClass.description: Block ID of your choosing to be used in CSS customization.

^tab-content(#.*)?$.description: Defines the list of content to be rendered in each tab. Only accepts tab-content.item as a child block.

blockClass.description: Block ID of your choosing to be used in CSS customization.

tabId.description: Tab ID of your choosing. Used to match the content to a given tab defined by tab-list.item or tab-list.item.children blocks.

^tab-content\\.item(#.*)?$.description: Defines the content panel associated with a specific tab in the tab-layout component.

defaultActiveTabId.description: ID of the desired tab to be rendered as the default one. If not provided, the first declared tab is used.

blockClass.description: Block ID of your choosing to be used in CSS customization.

^tab-layout(#.*)?$.description: Renders a tab layout component that organizes content into switchable tabs. Composed with tab-list and tab-content child blocks.

blockClass.description: Block ID of your choosing to be used in CSS customization.

^tab-list(#.*)?$.description: Renders a list of tabs. Must be declared as a child of tab-layout and contain tab-list.item or tab-list.item.children blocks.

blockClass.description: Block ID of your choosing to be used in CSS customization.

tabId.description: Tab ID of your choosing. Used to match the tab to its content defined by the tab-content.item block.

defaultActiveTab.description: Defines the item as the default active tab.

^tab-list\\.item(#.*)?$.description: Renders a single tab item inside a tab-list block, with a label and a tabId that links it to the corresponding tab-content.item.

blockClass.description: Block ID of your choosing to be used in CSS customization.

tabId.description: Tab ID of your choosing. Used to match the tab to a given content defined by the tab-content.item block.

^tab-list\\.item\\.children(#.*)?$.description: Flexible alternative to tab-list.item. Defines the rendering for a given tab and also accepts any array of blocks as its children.

^telemarketing(#.*)?$.description: Block that enables a call center operator to impersonate a customer in the store. Has no configurable props — it is a zero-configuration block that only requires being placed in the store header.

message.description: Custom message ID (i18n key) used to display the total products count. Supports ICU message format with {recordsFiltered} variable.

^total-products\\.v2(#.*)?$.description: Displays the total number of products found for that search. Uses context from the search page to render the count with a customizable message template.

textAlign.description: Position of the product's unit price in the list.

unitPriceType.description: Defines whether the price type should be displayed.

unitPriceDisplay.description: Defines when the unit price should be displayed. 'always' always displays; 'default' displays only when product quantity exceeds one.

displayUnitListPrice.description: Defines whether the product list price should be displayed. 'showWhenDifferent' displays when different from regular price; 'notShow' never displays.

^unit-price(#.*)?$.description: Displays the unit price of a product in the product list.

variation.description: Layout variation: 'inline' renders address on a single line, 'bar' renders it as a block.

showStreet.description: Whether to display the street name in the address.

showCityAndState.description: Whether to display city and state in the address.

showPostalCode.description: Whether to display the postal code in the address.

showPrefix.description: Whether to display the address type prefix label (e.g. pickup/delivery).

showIfEmpty.description: Whether to render the component and show an 'Add address' option when no address exists.

showIfMasked.description: Whether to render the address string when it contains masked characters (asterisks).

^user-address(#.*)?$.description: Displays the current user's shipping address with configurable display options. Supports inline or bar layout variations.

src.description: URL of the video to be displayed; accepts YouTube, Vimeo, or self-hosted video URLs.

name.description: Video name used for SEO and accessibility purposes.

description.description: Video description used for SEO and accessibility purposes.

type.description: MIME type of the video (e.g., video/mp4).

poster.description: Cover image URL displayed before video playback begins.

controlsType.description: Type of player controls to display; custom-vtex only works with HTML5 videos.

autoPlay.description: Automatically starts video playback after loading; also sets muted to true.

muted.description: Starts the video with audio off when set to true.

loop.description: Replays the video continuously when set to true.

playsInline.description: Plays the video inline (within the element) rather than fullscreen on mobile.

width.description: Display area width in pixels or percentage.

height.description: Display area height in pixels or percentage.

PlayIcon.description: Custom play icon ID used when controlsType is custom-vtex.

PauseIcon.description: Custom pause icon ID used when controlsType is custom-vtex.

VolumeOnIcon.description: Custom volume-on icon ID used when controlsType is custom-vtex.

VolumeOffIcon.description: Custom volume-off icon ID used when controlsType is custom-vtex.

FullscreenIcon.description: Custom fullscreen icon ID used when controlsType is custom-vtex.

classes.description: Overrides default CSS handles; useful when the block is imported as a React component.

^video(#.*)?$.description: Renders a video player on the storefront, supporting YouTube, Vimeo, and self-hosted HTML5 video URLs with configurable controls, autoplay, mute, loop, and accessibility metadata.

^wishlist-empty-list(#.*)?$.description: Container block that renders a custom view when the wishlist has no products. It has no configurable props of its own; it accepts children blocks (e.g. rich-text) and is enabled via showViewEmptyList on the parent list-context.wishlist block.
